title: Surgeon Vacancy at CMC Vellore - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at CMC Vellore - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CMC Vellore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CMC Vellore:
CMC Vellore is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore!
